---
title: A&E Forecasting Case Study
title-block-banner: resources/banner.png
include-back-link: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
            <meta http-equiv="refresh" content='0; URL=https://hsma.co.uk/previous_projects/hsma_6/H6_6011_Forecasting_modelling_for_A&E_attendance/index.html'></meta>
---

Redirecting to the case study. If you are not redirected within 3 seconds, click [here](https://hsma.co.uk/previous_projects/hsma_6/H6_6011_Forecasting_modelling_for_A&E_attendance/index.html) to go to the page.
